name: javascript-vuln-demo
description: DEMO — intentional supply-chain and runtime vulnerabilities

typosquat_examples.crossenv: typosquat of cross-env  — documented 2018 npm attack
typosquat_examples.colourama: typosquat of colorama   — documented PyPI attack
typosquat_examples.lodahs: typosquat of lodash     — substitutes number-1 for letter-l

stale_high_severity.event-stream@3.3.6: CVE — malicious payload injected Nov 2018 (supply chain)
stale_high_severity.flatmap-stream@0.1.1: malicious payload package from event-stream attack
stale_high_severity.node-serialize@0.0.4: RCE via deserialization — no patch available
